title: Explosive Pyramid Circuit
description: Complete 3-round circuit followed by an up-down pyramid for intense full body work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Explosive push-ups
exercises.instructions: Push hard to lift the hands off the floor

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with jump, land softly

exercises.name: Shoulder plank
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap the opposite shoulder alternating

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches
exercises.instructions: Elbow to opposite knee alternating, leg extended

exercises.name: Sit-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, sit all the way up, reach for the feet

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower thighs parallel to the floor

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
